text:
Created attachment 192512
New port .shar

This port installs shared lib of duktape, 
it is a dep of the new version of www/edbrowse.

WWW: http://duktape.org/

(tested in current 12.0 r332366 with '#port test': no error/warning)

Please commit it,
thanks Alfonso
